differential_diagnoses: Pyoderma gangrenosum (associated with PASH or PAPASH syndrome)
next_steps: Perform punch biopsy of the ulcer edge for histopathology (including tissue culture)
Consult dermatology for evaluation of neutrophilic dermatosis
Evaluate for underlying inflammatory bowel disease (Crohn's disease) with gastroenterology consultation
Review immunologic and genetic workup for autoinflammatory syndromes
